## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Specification updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] ADR added (if design decision)

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Third-party notices updated (if dependency changed)
- [ ] Temporary fix follow-up issue created (if applicable)
- [ ] Translation follow-up issue created (if applicable)
